info.title: AutoSend API
info.description: AutoSend REST API for managing event definitions and recording event logs for a project. These endpoints accept a standard project API key (AS_ prefix).

get.description: Retrieves all event definitions for the authenticated project.

post.description: Creates a new event definition under the project.

get.description: Retrieves a single event definition by its name.

patch.description: Updates the description or property schema of an existing event definition. The eventName itself cannot be changed.

delete.description: Soft-deletes an event definition. Existing event logs for this name are retained but no new logs can be recorded against it.

post.description: Records an event log for a contact. The eventName must match an existing event definition; properties are validated and coerced against the declared schema.
